query:
ALTER TABLE epi_assinaturas 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hash_sha256 VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS latitude VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS longitude VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS geo_accuracy VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS termo_aceito TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS texto_termo TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dispositivo_info TEXT DEFAULT NULL;
